name: White Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the olive oil and garlic (to taste) in a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl. Heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 3 minutes.
2. Remove the garlic pieces from the bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl. Cover and heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until heated through. Stir occasionally.
4. Serve over spaghetti.
